finding_results.notes: Replaced the second clinic-hour summary with on-page temptation/refusal action, then made Anika explicitly stop and self-report before adult enforcement. Jonah and Ravi consequences now follow her disclosure instead of substituting for it.
Converted the extra-hour block into a live exchange sequence and replaced euphemized anger with explicit spoken frustration plus immediate bodily action.
Inserted an embodied fear/shame beat after the slip and before Jonah resets rules. The self-report text now includes concrete physical and emotional consequence, not only schedule logistics.
Rewrote targeted clipped narration spans into complete clauses with explicit subjects/verbs and removed bare 'Not X.' constructions in those locations.
Chapter opening sensory lead was diversified away from repeated metallic-HVAC phrasing and anchored in marker dust, fan cadence, and floorboard response while preserving rec-center continuity.

summary: All five structural/craft findings in the pass packet were addressed in chapter_18 with explicit agency, unsanitized pressure beats, clipped-prose repairs, and opening-sensory variance while preserving continuity constraints.
